svg.text: What you learned building LLM Gateway

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain relational database design')
sendPrompt('What is an ORM and how does SQLAlchemy work?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis work for caching and rate limiting?')
sendPrompt('How does REST API design work?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI work?')
sendPrompt('What is layered architecture in backend?')
sendPrompt('How does Google OAuth work?')
sendPrompt('How do JWTs work?')
sendPrompt('What is AES-256 encryption?')
sendPrompt('How does role based access control work?')
sendPrompt('How does rate limiting work?')
sendPrompt('What are input guardrails for LLMs?')
sendPrompt('How does an API proxy work?')
sendPrompt('How do LLM tokens and costs work?')
sendPrompt('What is SHA-256 hashing used for?')
sendPrompt('How does React component architecture work?')
sendPrompt('How does client side routing work in React?')
sendPrompt('How does global state management work with Zustand?')
sendPrompt('How do Dockerfiles work?')
sendPrompt('How does Docker Compose networking work?')
sendPrompt('What are Docker volumes and why do they matter?')
sendPrompt('How do I deploy to Railway?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up GitHub Actions CI/CD?')
sendPrompt('How do I add streaming responses to FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('What is Neon serverless PostgreSQL?')
